title: GraphOTTER: Evolving LLM-based Graph Reasoning for Complex Table Question Answering
abstract: We introduce GraphOTTER, a framework that evolves LLM-based graph reasoning for hierarchical table question answering. By representing tables as graphs and using iterative graph traversal actions (VisitNode, GetAllNeighbours, GetSharedNeighbours, AnswerQuestion), GraphOTTER achieves state-of-the-art results on HiTab and AIT-QA benchmarks.

claims.statement: GraphOTTER achieves a notable improvement in complex table question answering, exhibiting an average performance gain of +4.77% over the best baseline.
combining graph representations with explicit reasoning creates a powerful synergy that harnesses the flexibility of the graph while mitigating its inherent complexity
